title: Final energy consumption by product (Eurostat)
description:
[Publisher: Eurostat]

Energy consumption of end-users, such as industry, transport, households, services and agriculture, by energy product (according to the Standard International Energy product Classification - SIEC). Expressed in thousand tonnes of oil equivalent. Excludes (1) consumption of the energy sector itself and losses occurring during transformation and distribution of energy, (2) all non-energy use of energy carriers (e.g. natural gas used for producing chemicals, oil based lubricants, bitumen used for road surface), (3) quantities delivered to international aviation and international marine bunkers.
